info.title: Puddle Storefront API
info.description: The Puddle Storefront API provides endpoints for integrating the Puddle platform with external online stores, enabling seamless product management, order processing, and customer interactions.

get.description: Retrieves the currently authenticated customer session profile. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

parameters.name: x-puddle-storefront-host

schema.description: Required for server-side callers when Origin/Referer is unavailable.

parameters.description: Required for server-side callers when Origin/Referer is unavailable.

400.description: The request could not be processed because the input is invalid.

401.description: The storefront public key is missing or invalid.

403.description: The storefront public key, host, or customer session is not allowed to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current cart, inventory, or account state.

429.description: Too many requests. Retry after a short delay.

put.description: Updates the profile details for the authenticated customer. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable. Requires a valid customer session cookie for the resolved storefront.

parameters.name: x-puddle-storefront-host

schema.description: Required for server-side callers when Origin/Referer is unavailable.

parameters.description: Required for server-side callers when Origin/Referer is unavailable.

get.description: Retrieves the current cart contents. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <storefront-public-key>`. Server-side callers must include `x-puddle-storefront-host` when `Origin`/`Referer` is unavailable.

subtotal.description: Cart merchandise subtotal before discounts, in minor currency units.

discount.description: Total active sale discount applied to cart items, in minor currency units.

total.description: Cart merchandise total after discounts and before shipping or gift-card payment.

freeShippingThreshold.description: Lowest active free-shipping threshold across enabled delivery methods.

amountToFreeShipping.description: Amount remaining before the cart reaches the free-shipping threshold.

ISO 8601 date-time string. tRPC callers may receive a Date.

price.description: Variant-specific price in minor currency units. When null, use the product price.

name.description: Product option name, for example Size or Colour.

value.description: Selected value for this variant option.

400.description: The request could not be processed because the input is invalid.

401.description: The storefront public key is missing or invalid.

403.description: The storefront public key, host, or customer session is not allowed to access this resource.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

409.description: The request conflicts with the current cart, inventory, or account state.

429.description: Too many requests. Retry after a short delay.
